'''kapumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugsomeness|ugsomeness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugsomeness|ugsomeness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kapumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæpimith|kæpimith]] || [[word:kæpimij|kæpimij]] || [[word:kæpimish|kæpimish]] || [[word:kæpimi|kæpimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapupumuth|kapupumuth]] || [[word:kapupumuj|kapupumuj]] || [[word:kapupumush|kapupumush]] || [[word:kapupumu|kapupumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapumuth|kapumuth]] || [[word:kapumuj|kapumuj]] || [[word:kapumush|kapumush]] || [[word:kapumu|kapumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapufmuth|kapufmuth]] || [[word:kapufmuj|kapufmuj]] || [[word:kapufmush|kapufmush]] || [[word:kapufmuf|kapufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kapumuthu|kapumuthu]] || [[word:kapumuju|kapumuju]] || [[word:kapumushu|kapumushu]] || [[word:kapumuku|kapumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kapumuth|kapumuth]] || [[word:kapumuj|kapumuj]] || [[word:kapumush|kapumush]] || [[word:kapumu|kapumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kapumuthul|kapumuthul]] || [[word:kapumujul|kapumujul]] || [[word:kapumushul|kapumushul]] || [[word:kapumukul|kapumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kapumuthuthu|kapumuthuthu]] || [[word:kapumujuju|kapumujuju]] || [[word:kapumushushu|kapumushushu]] || [[word:kapumuku|kapumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kapumuthun|kapumuthun]] || [[word:kapumujun|kapumujun]] || [[word:kapumushun|kapumushun]] || [[word:kapumukun|kapumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kapumuthuoro|kapumuthuoro]] || [[word:kapumujuoro|kapumujuoro]] || [[word:kapumushuoro|kapumushuoro]] || [[word:kapumukuoro|kapumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
